input.title: Project Kickoff Notes
input.transcript_text:
Maya: We need the beta timeline locked by Friday.
Jon: Agreed, we will keep scope focused on the API and CLI polish.
Priya: Decision: postpone OCR improvements to the next sprint.
ACTION: Maya | Send revised delivery timeline | 2026-04-20
ACTION: Jon | Prepare rollout checklist | 2026-04-22
Priya: I will draft the stakeholder update once the timeline is approved.
